title: _Vqxel_'s Broken Script
description: The Broken Script, but with quality-of-life features such as Sodium, Appleskin, Continuity, and Terralith. Check the description for critical information (or singleplayer will not work).
body:
Vqxel’s Broken Script is a lightweight modpack built around The Broken Script, one of the scariest horror mods in Minecraft. The focus is on delivering a smooth and immersive horror experience without unnecessary extras.

The pack includes performance and quality-of-life mods like Sodium for higher FPS, AppleSkin for food information, Continuity for smoother textures, and Terralith for improved world generation. With Essentials, you can also play with friends in the same world.

Designed to stay simple and easy to expand, this modpack gives you a cleaner, smoother, and more intense gameplay experience.

**_Distance Horizons_ must be disabled or deleted in order to play singleplayer, and the Resource Pack _ChicknTurtle's 3D Tools_ should not be used as the resource packs will fail to reload (_CIT Resewn_ can be optionally disabled as _ChicknTurtle's 3D Tools_ is not in use). This will be patched in the next version of my modpack.**
